root.title: {{appName}} — identity, secured
root.description: Authentication, profiles and a public atlas. Your identity, with an aura.

manifest.description: Authora — authentication and profile management platform

hero.title: Your identity,<lineBreak/>wrapped in an <accent>aura</accent>.
hero.description: Authentication that protects without getting in the way — confirmation codes, recovery, two-factor and social linking, all in one calm surface.

auth.title: Sessions that hold
auth.description: Email and password with JWT access and refresh tokens, rotation and httpOnly cookie storage. The session restores itself before you notice it lapsed.

twoFactor.title: A second factor
twoFactor.description: Time-based codes from any authenticator app, enrolled with a QR code and verified on sign-in.

oauth.title: Bring your accounts
oauth.description: Sign in or link GitHub and Telegram to one identity, and disconnect them at any time.

atlas.title: A public atlas
atlas.description: Browse countries, regions and cities served directly from the GraphQL API.

about.title: About {{appName}}
about.description: This is a demo fullstack application with a Next.js frontend using Feature-Sliced Design and an Express + GraphQL backend using Clean Architecture. It showcases JWT authentication with refresh-token rotation, email confirmation, password recovery, two-factor authentication, profile management and public geographic pages.
about.stack: Frontend: Next.js · TypeScript · Redux · Sass · PWA.

notFound.description: This page could not be found.

footer.description: Authentication, account recovery and profile management platform.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.description: Check your internet connection and try again.
